# StoredCopyValidator - Test Cases

> TestRail Import Format
> **Project**: HP Workpath StoredCopyValidator
> **Suite**: Stored Copy Validation
> **Created**: 2026-04-03

---

## Section 1: Copy Tab - Store Copy Basic Operations

### TC-1001: Store Copy with default settings (auto-generated job name)

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with default settings (auto-generated job name)                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Description**     | Verify that a store copy job is submitted successfully using all default settings with auto-generated job name.                                                                                                                      |
| **Precondition**    | 1. StoredCopyValidator app is installed and launched on the HP printer.`<br>`2. Capabilities are loaded (Toast "Capabilities loaded" shown).`<br>`3. Paper is loaded in ADF or on flatbed scanner.`<br>`4. Copy tab is active. |
| **Steps**           | 1. Leave Store Job Name empty (blank).`<br>`2. Leave Job Folder as "ValidatorFolder".`<br>`3. Leave all spinner settings as defaults.`<br>`4. Leave Password Type as NONE.`<br>`5. Press "Copy (Store)" button.              |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Toast "Store Copy submitted: RID=..." is displayed.`<br>`2. Store Job Name field is cleared (reset to empty) after submission.`<br>`3. The job is stored on the printer with a name formatted as "StoreJob_yyyyMMddHHmmss".   |

---

### TC-1002: Store Copy with custom job name

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with custom job name                                                                                                                                     |
| **Description**     | Verify that a store copy job can be submitted with a user-specified job name.                                                                                       |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                            |
| **Steps**           | 1. Enter "MyTestJob" in Store Job Name field.`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.                                |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Toast "Store Copy submitted: RID=..." is displayed.`<br>`2. Store Job Name is cleared after submission.`<br>`3. Stored job is created with name "MyTestJob". |

---

### TC-1003: Store Copy with custom folder name

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with custom folder name                                                                                                                                 |
| **Description**     | Verify that a store copy job can be submitted with a custom folder name.                                                                                           |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                           |
| **Steps**           | 1. Leave Store Job Name empty.`<br>`2. Change Job Folder to "TestFolder".`<br>`3. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`4. Press "Copy (Store)" button. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Toast "Store Copy submitted: RID=..." is displayed.`<br>`2. The stored job folder is "TestFolder" (verifiable via Stored tab Enumerate).                      |

---

### TC-1004: Store Copy with multiple copies

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with Copies set to a value greater than 1                                                                                                                          |
| **Description**     | Verify that the copies count is correctly applied when storing a copy job.                                                                                                    |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                      |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Copies to "3".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`4. Switch to Stored tab, press Enumerate, select the job. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Store copy is submitted successfully.`<br>`2. In Stored tab, the job detail shows "Copies: 3".                                                                           |

---

## Section 2: Copy Tab - Color Mode & Duplex Settings

### TC-2001: Store Copy with each Color Mode

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy - Color Mode variation                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Description**     | Verify that store copy works with different color mode settings.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                                                                                               |
| **Steps**           | 1. Select a non-default Color Mode from the spinner (e.g., AUTO, MONOCHROME, COLOR).`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`4. Go to Stored tab → Enumerate → Select the job → Press Detail. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`2. Detail info shows the selected Color Mode value.                                                                                                                                                       |

---

### TC-2002: Store Copy with Scan Duplex = DUPLEX

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with two-sided scanning (Duplex)                                                                              |
| **Description**     | Verify that store copy works when scan duplex is set to duplex mode.                                                     |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Double-sided document is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active. |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Scan Duplex to "DUPLEX".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.   |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`2. Both sides of the document are scanned and stored.                       |

---

### TC-2003: Store Copy with Print Duplex = DUPLEX

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with two-sided printing (Duplex)                                                                                                                                          |
| **Description**     | Verify that store copy job is configured for duplex printing.                                                                                                                        |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                             |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Print Duplex to "DUPLEX".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`4. Go to Stored tab → Enumerate → Select → Detail. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`2. Detail info shows Output Sides as duplex.                                                                                            |

## Section 3: Copy Tab - Scan & Print Settings

### TC-3001: Store Copy with Landscape Orientation

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with Landscape orientation                                                                                       |
| **Description**     | Verify store copy works with landscape orientation setting.                                                                 |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Landscape-oriented document loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active. |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Orientation to "LANDSCAPE".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.   |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully with landscape orientation applied.                                                       |

---

### TC-3002: Store Copy with specific Scan Size

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with specific scan media size                                                                                                        |
| **Description**     | Verify store copy works with a specific scan size (e.g., LETTER, A4).                                                                           |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Matching paper loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                  |
| **Steps**           | 1. Select a specific Scan Size (e.g., "LETTER" or "A4").`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button. |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully. Original size in detail matches the selected scan size.                                                      |

---

### TC-3003: Store Copy with Scan Source = FLATBED

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy using flatbed scanner                                                                                        |
| **Description**     | Verify store copy works when scan source is set to flatbed.                                                             |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Document placed on flatbed glass.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.      |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Scan Source to "FLATBED".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button. |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully. The document is scanned from the flatbed.                                            |

---

### TC-3004: Store Copy with specific Print Size and Paper Source

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with specific print size and paper source                                                                                                                                                |
| **Description**     | Verify store copy applies print size and paper source settings.                                                                                                                                     |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                                            |
| **Steps**           | 1. Select a specific Print Size (e.g., "LETTER").`<br>`2. Select a specific Paper Source (e.g., "TRAY_1").`<br>`3. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`4. Press "Copy (Store)" button. |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully with the specified print size and paper source.                                                                                                                   |

---

### TC-3005: Store Copy with Collate Mode = COLLATED

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with collation enabled                                                                                                                      |
| **Description**     | Verify store copy works with collation set to COLLATED.                                                                                                |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Multi-page document loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copies set to 2 or more.`<br>`4. Copy tab is active. |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Copies to "2".`<br>`2. Set Collate Mode to "COLLATED".`<br>`3. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`4. Press "Copy (Store)" button. |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully with collation applied.                                                                                              |

## Section 4: Copy Tab - Retention & Password Settings

### TC-4001: Store Copy with Password Type = NUMERIC

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with NUMERIC password protection                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Description**     | Verify that a store copy job can be created with a numeric PIN.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Password Type to "NUMERIC".`<br>`2. Verify Job Password label and field become visible.`<br>`3. Verify keyboard displays number pad only.`<br>`4. Enter a numeric password (e.g., "1234").`<br>`5. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`6. Go to Stored tab → Enumerate → Select the job. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Job Password field becomes visible when NUMERIC is selected.`<br>`2. Number pad keyboard is shown.`<br>`3. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`4. In Stored tab, job shows "Password Type: NUMERIC".                                                                                         |

---

### TC-4002: Store Copy with Password Type = ALPHA_NUMERIC

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with ALPHA_NUMERIC password protection                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Description**     | Verify that a store copy job can be created with an alphanumeric password.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Password Type to "ALPHA_NUMERIC".`<br>`2. Verify Job Password label and field become visible.`<br>`3. Verify keyboard displays full text keyboard (not number pad).`<br>`4. Enter an alphanumeric password (e.g., "Pass123!").`<br>`5. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`6. Go to Stored tab → Enumerate → Select the job. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Job Password field becomes visible when ALPHA_NUMERIC is selected.`<br>`2. Full text keyboard is shown, allowing letters and numbers.`<br>`3. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`4. In Stored tab, job shows "Password Type: ALPHA_NUMERIC".                                                                                    |

---

### TC-4003: Password field hidden when Password Type = NONE

| Field                     | Value                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Job Password field hidden when NONE selected                                            |
| **Description**     | Verify the Job Password label and input field are invisible when Password Type is NONE. |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Copy tab is active.                  |
| **Steps**           | 1. Verify Password Type defaults to "NONE".`<br>`2. Observe the Job Password area.    |
| **Expected Result** | Job Password label and input field are not visible (hidden).                            |

---

### TC-4004: Password field cleared on Password Type change

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Job Password cleared when switching Password Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Description**     | Verify the password value is reset each time the password type selection changes.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Copy tab is active.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set Password Type to "NUMERIC".`<br>`2. Enter "1234" in the Job Password field.`<br>`3. Change Password Type to "ALPHA_NUMERIC".`<br>`4. Observe the Job Password field.`<br>`5. Enter "Pass123" in the Job Password field.`<br>`6. Change Password Type to "NONE". |
| **Expected Result** | 1. At step 3: Password field is cleared (empty), keyboard switches to full text.`<br>`2. At step 6: Password field is hidden and value is cleared.                                                                                                                             |

---

### TC-4005: Store Copy with Delete on Power Cycle = DELETE

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with retention mode DELETE on power cycle                                                                                                                                |
| **Description**     | Verify that the stored job respects the Delete on Power Cycle setting.                                                                                                              |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                            |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set On Power Cycle to "DELETE".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`4. Verify job is stored (Stored tab → Enumerate). |
| **Expected Result** | Store copy submitted successfully. Job is stored with deletion on power cycle policy.                                                                                               |

---

### TC-4006: Store Copy with Delete on Release = DELETE

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Store Copy with retention mode DELETE on release                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Description**     | Verify that the stored job is removed after being released if Delete on Release is set.                                                                                                                                      |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                                                                                                     |
| **Steps**           | 1. Set On Release to "DELETE".`<br>`2. Leave all other settings as defaults.`<br>`3. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`4. Go to Stored tab → Enumerate → Select the job → Release.`<br>`5. Press Enumerate again. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Store copy submitted successfully.`<br>`2. After release, the job is automatically deleted from the stored list.                                                                                                        |

---

## Section 5: Copy Tab - UI State & Tab Switching

### TC-5001: Store Job Name auto-reset after Copy

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Store Job Name field resets after successful copy                                                                                                      |
| **Description**     | Verify the Store Job Name field is cleared after a successful store copy submission.                                                                   |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Paper is loaded in ADF.`<br>`3. Copy tab is active.                                               |
| **Steps**           | 1. Enter "TestJobName" in Store Job Name.`<br>`2. Press "Copy (Store)" button.`<br>`3. Observe the Store Job Name field after toast is shown.      |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Toast "Store Copy submitted: RID=..." appears.`<br>`2. Store Job Name field is cleared (empty) with hint "Auto: StoreJob_yyyyMMddHHmmss" visible. |

---

### TC-5002: Capabilities persist after tab switching

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Copy settings retained after switching tabs                                                                                                                          |
| **Description**     | Verify that switching to Stored tab and back to Copy tab retains capabilities and spinner values.                                                                    |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. Copy tab is active with spinners populated.                                                                       |
| **Steps**           | 1. Note the current spinner values on Copy tab.`<br>`2. Switch to Stored tab.`<br>`3. Switch back to Copy tab.`<br>`4. Observe spinners and capability status. |
| **Expected Result** | 1. All spinners are re-populated with capabilities values.`<br>`2. Copy (Store) button works without "Capabilities not loaded yet" error.                          |

---

## Section 6: Stored Tab - Enumerate

### TC-6001: Enumerate stored jobs - jobs exist

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Enumerate stored jobs when jobs exist on printer                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Description**     | Verify that pressing Enumerate displays a list of stored jobs.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. At least one store copy job has been submitted.`<br>`3. Stored tab is active.                                                                                                             |
| **Steps**           | 1. Press "Enumerate" button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Job list is populated in the left panel.`<br>`2. Each item shows job name (folder) and job ID.`<br>`3. No item is pre-selected (selection is cleared).`<br>`4. Detail/Release/Delete buttons remain disabled until a job is selected. |

---

### TC-6002: Enumerate stored jobs - no jobs exist

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Enumerate stored jobs when no jobs exist                                                                                                     |
| **Description**     | Verify the app handles an empty stored job list gracefully.                                                                                  |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched and capabilities loaded.`<br>`2. No stored jobs on the printer (or all have been deleted).`<br>`3. Stored tab is active. |
| **Steps**           | 1. Press "Enumerate" button.                                                                                                                 |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Toast "No stored jobs found" is displayed.`<br>`2. Job list is empty.`<br>`3. Detail/Release/Delete buttons remain disabled.          |

---

### TC-6003: Enumerate clears previous selection highlight

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Enumerate resets list selection and highlight                                                                                                                |
| **Description**     | Verify that re-enumerating clears any previously selected item.                                                                                              |
| **Precondition**    | 1. App launched, Stored tab active.`<br>`2. At least one stored job exists.                                                                                |
| **Steps**           | 1. Press Enumerate.`<br>`2. Select a job from the list (it becomes highlighted).`<br>`3. Press Enumerate again.                                          |
| **Expected Result** | 1. After step 3: No item is highlighted in the list.`<br>`2. Right panel resets to "Selected: None".`<br>`3. Detail/Release/Delete buttons are disabled. |

---

## Section 7: Stored Tab - Select & Detail

### TC-7001: Select a stored job - basic info displayed

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Subject**         | Select a stored job from list and view basic info                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Description**     | Verify that selecting a job displays its basic information in the right panel.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Precondition**    | 1. Stored tab active, Enumerate done, jobs in list.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Steps**           | 1. Tap a job from the list.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Expected Result** | 1. Selected item is highlighted (light blue background).`<br>`2. Right panel shows: "Selected: {jobName}".`<br>`3. Details show: ID, Folder, User, Timestamp, Copies, Password Type.`<br>`4. Detail/Release/Delete buttons become enabled. |

---

### TC-7002: Select a stored job - Password Type display

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Stored job selection displays Password Type correctly                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Description**     | Verify that Password Type (NONE, NUMERIC, ALPHA_NUMERIC) is shown instead of "PIN Required: true/false".                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Precondition**    | 1. Stored tab active.`<br>`2. Jobs with different password types have been stored.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Steps**           | 1. Enumerate stored jobs.`<br>`2. Select a job with Password Type NONE.`<br>`3. Select a job with Password Type NUMERIC.`<br>`4. Select a job with Password Type ALPHA_NUMERIC.                                                                                               |
| **Expected Result** | 1. NONE job shows "Password Type: NONE", password field is hidden.`<br>`2. NUMERIC job shows "Password Type: NUMERIC", password field is visible with number pad.`<br>`3. ALPHA_NUMERIC job shows "Password Type: ALPHA_NUMERIC", password field is visible with full keyboard. |

---

### TC-7003: Selection highlight changes when selecting different job

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | Job selection highlight moves between items                                                                                       |
| **Description**     | Verify that selecting a different job moves the highlight to the new item.                                                        |
| **Precondition**    | 1. Stored tab active.`<br>`2. At least 2 stored jobs enumerated.                                                                |
| **Steps**           | 1. Select the first job from the list.`<br>`2. Select the second job from the list.                                             |
| **Expected Result** | 1. First job highlight is removed.`<br>`2. Second job is now highlighted.`<br>`3. Right panel info updates to the second job. |

---

### TC-7004: View stored job detail (inline)

| Field                     | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Subject**         | View detailed stored job information via Detail button
